description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk constructed primarily from light-colored wood, featuring a smooth, flat tabletop with a subtle natural wood grain pattern. The desk stands on four slender, tapered legs that are slightly darker at the top and transition to a lighter tone at the bottom, giving a two-tone effect. The front side of the desk is equipped with three integrated drawers, each with minimalist horizontal cutout handles for a sleek appearance. The sides and back of the desk are plain, with no additional features or hardware visible. The overall design is minimalist and functional, suitable for contemporary urban environments. The craftsmanship and finish suggest a high-quality, durable piece of furniture.
description: A minimalist, light wood desk with three front drawers and slender, two-tone legs. The design is sleek and modern, with a smooth tabletop and subtle wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing three integrated drawers with horizontal cutout handles and all four tapered legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the desk's depth, plain side panel, and the profile of the slender legs.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a featureless rear panel and the four supporting legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the plain side and leg profile.
attribute_orientation: The side with three drawers and cutout handles is intended to face the user, serving as the front of the desk; the opposite side is plain and functions as the back.
